creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just committed a change to freebsd/main (CURRENT) so you no longer need to patch your kernel but only set a tunable.

You want to back-out the previous 4GB patch before updating and also put the following into loader.conf:

compat.linuxkpi.skb.mem_limit=1

I updated the wiki page and sent an email to the freebsd-wireless list as well:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/WiFi/Rtw88
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-wireless/2022-May/000500.html


I will also MFC the driver soon to stable/13 for people to try there without having to manually cherry-pick changes anymore.
